raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I took a tricycle taxi from XXXX XXXX XXXX to XXXX XXXX. The agreed-upon fare was {$20.00}, as confirmed on the XXXX card reader when I swiped my CitiBank credit card. However, my account was later charged {$310.00}, a significant overcharge. This transaction does not reflect the agreed-upon amount or the service provided. 
I immediately disputed this charge with CitiBank, providing all relevant details, including the agreed fare, transaction method, and the discrepancy in the posted charge. Despite this, CitiBank declined to reverse the overcharge or provide any resolution as of XX/XX/year>. 
This unauthorized transaction not only caused financial harm but also raised concerns about the bank 's lack of protection for its customers against fraudulent or unethical practices. I feel unsupported and disappointed by CitiBank 's handling of this dispute.
